# Andrew Napier - Resume and Portfolio
Website: https://napier.global

## About
Andrew Napier is a Lead Cloud Engineer and Principal Software Engineer with over 8 years of professional experience across varied industries. Andrew has extensive experience in AI, cloud architecture, backend systems, and DevOps.

## Tech Stack
- Backend: Golang, NodeJS, Python, Bash
- Frontend: Javascript
- Databases: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis
- Cloud & Infrastructure: AWS, Azure, Terraform, Docker, Kubernetes
- CI/CD: Github Actions, CircleCI
- Observability: Datadog, ELK, Prometheus, Grafana
- AI: Claude, MCP (Model Context Protocol)

## Work Experience
- Scrums.com: Principal Software Engineer
- IQVIA: Lead Cloud Engineer
- Merge: Head of Engineering
- Paystack: Senior Software Engineer
- Luno: Full Stack Engineer
- Jembi Health Systems: Junior Software Developer

## Education
University of Stellenbosch, Bachelor of Engineering (Electrical and Electronic)

Hire or contact Andrew Napier for roles such as CTO, Principal Software Engineer, Lead Cloud Engineer, Senior Backend Engineer, Platform Engineer, Data Engineer, or Full Stack Software Engineer.
